mapper.insert: insert into note_embeddings ( note_id, embedding, source_version, source_text_hash, embedding_dimension, embedding_input, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, embedded_at, updated_at ) values ( #{noteId}, #{vectorLiteral}::vector, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceTextHash}, #{dimension}, #{embeddingInput}, #{provider}, #{model}, 'EMBEDDED', null, null, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (note_id) do update set embedding = excluded.embedding, source_version = excluded.source_version, source_text_hash = excluded.source_text_hash, embedding_dimension = excluded.embedding_dimension, embedding_input = excluded.embedding_input, provider = excluded.provider, model = excluded.model, status = 'EMBEDDED', failure_code = null, failure_message = null, attempt_count = note_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into note_embeddings ( note_id, source_version, source_text_hash, embedding_dimension, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, updated_at ) values ( #{noteId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceTextHash}, 1536, #{provider}, #{model}, 'FAILED', #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (note_id) do update set source_version = excluded.source_version, source_text_hash = excluded.source_text_hash, embedding_dimension = 1536, provider = excluded.provider, model = excluded.model, status = 'FAILED', embedding = null, failure_code = excluded.failure_code, failure_message = excluded.failure_message, attempt_count = note_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp
